title: Opening for Medical Officer at Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates:
Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates!
